# Chapter 2: Equations of state, phase changes  (~100 pp)
- 2.1 Ideal gas (12) · 2.2 Real-gas equations (15) · 2.3 Liquids and solids: incompressibility approximation (10) · 2.4 Phase diagrams: PVT, T-S, h-s (15) · 2.5 Saturation states and quality (12) · 2.6 Properties tables and software (10) · 2.7 Worked examples: steam table use, refrigerant cycle (15) · 2.8 Failure section: cavitation, water-hammer, BLEVE (11)

**Archetype**: stability, scaling. **Project**: trace a real refrigerant through a real cycle on a P-h diagram. **Exercises**: 35.
